allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $mcp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/healthz" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "MCP /healthz: OK \($\($mcp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "MCP /healthz: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $be = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Backend /api/health: status=$\($be.status\) tools=$\($be.tool_count\) mcp=$\($be.mcp_sse_url\)" } catch { Write-Host "Backend /api/health: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node --version; npm list -g pptxgenjs 2>$null; \(Get-Command soffice -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command pdftoppm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; python -m pip show markitdown 2>$null | Select-String "^Name|^Version")

PowerShell($f = Get-Item "C:\\Workspace\\hready\\mqacemcp\\documents\\MQ_ACE_Platform_Story.pptx"; "$\($f.Length\) bytes"; ""; $out = python -m markitdown "C:\\Workspace\\hready\\mqacemcp\\documents\\MQ_ACE_Platform_Story.pptx" 2>&1; \($out | Select-String -Pattern "Slide number:" | Measure-Object\).Count; "slides found"; ""; $out | Select-String -Pattern "Slide number:|From Console Chaos|The Invisible Backbone|A Day in the Life|From Zero to Thirteen|Next Layer: Agentic|How the Agentic AI Works|Engineering Rigour:" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })

PowerShell($tmp = "C:\\Workspace\\hready\\mqacemcp\\.tmp_ref"; $zip = "$tmp\\ref.zip"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tmp | Out-Null; Copy-Item "C:\\Users\\ajitk\\Downloads\\Agentic_Platform_Intelligence_\(4\).pptx" $zip; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath "$tmp\\unpacked"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse "$tmp\\unpacked\\ppt\\media" | Select-Object Name, Length | Sort-Object Length -Descending)

PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\ajitk\\Downloads\\Agentic_Platform_Intelligence_\(4\).pptx"; $dest = "C:\\Workspace\\hready\\mqacemcp\\documents\\_ref_unpack"; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dest }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest | Out-Null; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\($src, $dest\); Get-ChildItem -Recurse "$dest\\ppt\\media" | Select-Object Name, Length)
